name: ASCue
brief_description: Resource for event activation and synchronization within the Ability System.

properties.name: activation_blocked_all_tags
properties.description: Cue cannot execute if owner has [b]all[/b] of these tags simultaneously (AND logic).

properties.name: activation_blocked_any_tags
properties.description: Cue cannot execute if owner has [b]any[/b] of these tags (OR logic).

properties.name: activation_required_all_tags
properties.description: Owner must have [b]all[/b] of these tags for the cue to execute (AND logic).

properties.name: activation_required_any_tags
properties.description: Owner must have [b]at least one[/b] of these tags for the cue to execute (OR logic).

properties.name: cue_name
properties.description: Unique name for this cue resource.

properties.name: event_type
properties.description: Defines when the cue is triggered (OnExecute, OnActive, or OnRemove).

properties.name: node_name
properties.description: Optional name of a node registered in the [ASComponent] via [method ASComponent.register_node]. If set, the cue will target that specific node; otherwise, it will use the component's default nodes.

methods.name: _on_active
methods.description: Virtual method called when the cue becomes active.

methods.name: _on_execute
methods.description: Virtual method called when the cue is executed instantly.

methods.name: _on_remove
methods.description: Virtual method called when the cue is removed.

constants.name: ON_EXECUTE
constants.description: Triggered for instant effects (e.g., hit impact, explosion).

constants.name: ON_ACTIVE
constants.description: Triggered when an effect/ability becomes active.
